notes: Internal ground-truth is the red merged 'ADP' emblem with a registered mark - this is the unmistakable Automatic Data Processing (ADP) corporate trademark (ADP Red #D0271D, unchanged since 1975). Rendered the official Wikimedia Commons SVG (commons c/cf/Automatic_Data_Processing_(logo).svg) to a 1000x454 transparent PNG via image proxy because Wikimedia direct download was HTTP 429 rate-limiting my IP throughout the session (true vector unobtainable directly). Visually verified it matches the internal mark exactly. Caveat: ADP is the US payroll/HR giant, an unusual fit for a Czech automotive reference list - the MARK is a confident identity match, but whether Sintera's client is genuinely this entity carries minor ambiguity.

'aero' and 'aero-vodochody' are the SAME company: Aero Vodochody (blue cursive 'Aero | VODOCHODY'). Matches internal ground-truth exactly. Rendered the official Wikimedia SVG (commons 5/57/AERO_Vodochody_logo.svg) to a 1200x286 transparent PNG via image proxy because Wikimedia direct was HTTP 429 rate-limited the entire session. Visually confirmed. PNG (not SVG) only because the true vector was unobtainable directly; the proxy always rasterizes.

Same company/asset as 'aero' (Aero Vodochody). 1200x286 transparent PNG rendered from the official Wikimedia SVG via proxy (Wikimedia direct was 429 rate-limited). Visually confirmed to match internal ground-truth (blue cursive 'Aero | VODOCHODY').

Correctly identified as AKT Cechy (akt-cechy.cz, AKT plastikarska technologie Cechy, Boryszew Group automotive plastics supplier) - the blue 'AKT' mark matches internal ground-truth. However NO acceptable asset exists: the official site only offers PNG logos at 290px (opaque) and 259px (transparent), both well below the 600px minimum, and no SVG/vector source was found anywhere. Keeping the internal logo is the honest outcome.

ALL DEST CZ - International Express Transport (alldest.cz), automotive express logistics - correct entity. Official-site vector SVG (8.7KB, valid <svg>/</svg>, viewBox 192x58). Rendered and visually confirmed: 'ALL DEST CZ / International Express Transport' with the circular symbol - same wordmark/mark as internal. Note this is the gray monochrome variant; internal is red+grey, but wordmark/structure match exactly. (The /grapa-uploads/ path returned HTML; the correct asset is under /wp-content/uploads/.)

Internal mark is 'AMTEK - QUALITY MOULDS. LIFELONG IMPRESSIONS.' with a distinctive orange/navy triangle. The candidate UK companies do NOT match: amtekplastics.co.uk has a different tagline ('Built for reliability. Driven by results') and a tiny different logo; amtek-precision.com is also unrelated branding. The 'Quality Moulds. Lifelong Impressions.' AMTEK (likely a different, possibly Indian, mould maker) could not be confidently confirmed. Wrong-entity risk avoided -> none. Keep internal logo.

Internal mark is 'APAG ELEKTRONIK s.r.o.' (Pardubice, automotive electronics). The company has since rebranded to 'APAGCoSyst' - a DIFFERENT wordmark from the internal 'APAG ELEKTRONIK'. The current site only offers a 180px transparent PNG (logo.png), no SVG, and the wordmark differs from the internal ground-truth. No clean, large, correctly-branded asset available -> none. Keep internal logo.

ARaymond (araymond.com), French industrial fastening group - correct entity. Official-site header vector SVG (12KB, valid <svg>/</svg>, 274x43 viewBox). Rendered and visually confirmed: 'ARaymond' wordmark + blue 'RG' circular fastener mark - matches internal ground-truth exactly. Internal also shows a 'MORE THAN FASTENING' tagline; this is the official primary logo without the tagline line (same wordmark + symbol).

ASTOS Machinery a.s. (astos.cz), Czech manufacturer of chip conveyors/filtration for machine tools. Ground-truth = blue/orange triangular 'A' mark + ASTOS MACHINERY wordmark. Official site only serves a transparent PNG logo at 257x112px (fails the >=600px requirement); no vector or large-PNG source found on Wikimedia, brandfetch, seeklogo, or worldvectorlogo. Honest none - keep internal logo.

Aufeer Design / Aufeer Group (aufeerdesign.com, part of Matador Group), Czech automotive engineering/design. Found an official SVG, but it is the rebranded all-white (fill:#fff) wordmark used on dark headers - invisible on light/transparent backgrounds and NOT usable standalone. It also differs from the Sintera ground truth, which shows the OLDER blue/black parallelogram 'A' + AUFEER DESIGN branding. No colored vector of the old mark available. Avoided shipping a white/wrong-era logo - keep internal.

Autometal spol. s r.o. (autometal.net), Czech maker of exhaust/emission-control systems - matches ground-truth 'AUTOMETAL Emission Control' blue 'A' arrow mark (correct entity confirmed; there are other unrelated 'Autometal' companies). Official site only serves a transparent PNG at 200x37px (fails >=600px). No vector source found. Honest none - keep internal.

Automotive Lighting (Reutlingen; now Marelli Automotive Lighting). Wikimedia Commons SVG (900x300), validated well-formed. Renders to the exact ground-truth mark: gray 'A' + yellow 'L' (#fab70a) triangular monogram + AUTOMOTIVE LIGHTING wordmark. Wikimedia upload host was 429-rate-limiting generic UAs; succeeded by using a descriptive User-Agent per Wikimedia API etiquette.

BENTELER International AG. Wikimedia Commons SVG, validated. Renders to blue BENTELER wordmark + the inverted three-triangle mark, matching ground truth exactly (current official version also carries a 'makes it happen' tagline; mark/wordmark identical).

Ambiguous name 'Best' resolved via ground truth to BEST TRANSPORT a.s. (best-transport.cz, operated by CSAD Brno-Cernovice). Official site serves a dedicated Adobe-Illustrator SVG (alt='BEST Transport'), validated and rendered: blue (#0073BD) italic 'BEST' wordmark + 'TRANSPORT' band + 'a.s.' - matches the internal mark. Avoided the unrelated Swedish 'Best Transport' courier and various other same-name firms.

Bombardier. Wikimedia Commons SVG, validated well-formed; contains the full black BOMBARDIER wordmark (qlmanage preview crops width but file is complete). Matches the internal Bombardier wordmark logo.
Robert Bosch GmbH. Wikimedia Commons SVG, validated. Renders to the iconic round armature mark + red BOSCH wordmark, matching ground truth exactly.

Official Bronswerk Heat Transfer footer logo (vector SVG) from bronswerk.com. Renders as the blue 'BRONSWERK / HEAT TRANSFER' wordmark · exact match to the internal ground-truth mark (same wordmark and blue color; internal additionally carries the 'Dynamic Heat Exchange Solutions' strapline, but core brand identical). Clean vector, valid <svg>...</svg>.

Official Bull logo (vector SVG) from bull.com header. CORRECT company (Bull, the French HPC/IT firm, now part of Atos/Eviden) but this is the CURRENT post-Atos rebrand: navy 'Bull' wordmark with an orange square-tree icon. The internal ground-truth is the OLDER glossy grey/green 'BuLL' wordmark with a green square. Same entity, newer official mark · standard practice for a reference site. Caveat: visual style differs from internal due to rebrand.

Busch Vacuum Solutions logo, 1205x369 transparent PNG (alpha min 0). Official Wikimedia/official SVG was unreachable (Wikimedia 429 IP throttle on all paths; buschvacuum.com bot-blocked 406; seeklogo gave a white-bg thumbnail). This AIChE-hosted copy is the genuine current Busch Vacuum Solutions logo: orange 'BUSCH' with the U-shape motif + 'VACUUM SOLUTIONS' · exact match to the internal orange BUSCH/U-shapes mark (internal is icon-only crop). Busch rebranded to 'Busch Vacuum Solutions' in 2020; this is the correct current full logo.

No clean asset better than internal. Official cdt.cz logo-rgb.png is only 440px wide (below 600px threshold) and transparent, and depicts the CURRENT ČD-Telematika branding (stylized 'ČD' monogram + 'Telematika' + 'Člen Skupiny ČD') which differs from the internal ground-truth mark (blue/red ellipse 'D' with 'ČD-TELEMATIKA'). No SVG or higher-res variant found; Wikimedia throttled; no worldvectorlogo entry. Keep internal logo.

Wrong-mark risk avoided. CertiCon a.s. was acquired by / merged into HTEC and rebranded; certicon.cz now serves ONLY HTEC-branded logos (htec-logo-black.svg / htec-logo-white.svg), which are a visually different mark than the internal 'CERTICON' wordmark (with grey circle + blue square). Using the HTEC logo would substitute a different brand. No original CertiCon vector found on worldvectorlogo/seeklogo/Wikimedia. Keep the internal CERTICON logo.

No acceptable asset. Official cikautxo.com header logo (/assets/img/logo.png) is only 180x93 · far below the 600px threshold (though transparent and correct: 'cikautxo S.COOP.' with orange swirl). No inline SVG, no press/media SVG, no worldvectorlogo/Wikimedia entry. Wikimedia throttled. Keep internal logo.

Official ComAp logo extracted as inline header SVG from comap-control.com (Czech control-systems maker; viewBox 0 0 351 80, red accent #E20714). Renders as black 'ComAp' wordmark with the red play-triangle · exact match to the internal ground-truth (internal additionally has 'the heart of smart control' tagline). IMPORTANT: deliberately AVOIDED worldvectorlogo/seeklogo/cdnlogo 'Comap' entries · those are the FRENCH Comap plumbing company (magenta 'COMAP' wordmark), a different entity. Verified by rendering.

Continental AG official wordmark (vector SVG, viewBox ~220x45). Renders as the classic 'Continental' wordmark with the distinctive 'C' enclosing the 'o' · unmistakably Continental, exact wordmark match to the internal ground-truth. This version is black (internal is the orange color variant); the wordmark shape is identical, color can be themed on-site. Wikimedia (Continental_logo.svg) was 429-throttled so used worldvectorlogo's clean copy instead.

Official CoorsTek site header logo (Adobe Illustrator SVG). Rendered confirms the CoorsTek wordmark in white on the brand red square/rect, matching the internal ground truth. Valid vector (4989 bytes, <svg>...</svg>). Background is the brand red rect (not transparent) but it is a clean official vector.

Official Crystalex site logo (www.crystalex.cz redirects to crystalexcz.com). Transparent PNG 757x215, alpha 0-255. Blue script 'Crystalex' wordmark, exact match to internal. No SVG available on site; transparent PNG is >=600px wide so accepted.

Official csad-brno.cz header SVG. Rendered confirms the exact internal mark: blue intertwined-tube 'CSAD' letters with 'BRNO-CERNOVICE, A.S.' underneath. This is the correct Brno-Cernovice variant, distinct from (and better than) the generic winged red 'CSAD logo.svg' on Wikipedia. Valid vector (13268 bytes).

Official DAIHO INDUSTRIAL site (daiho-gr.co.jp) header SVG. Rendered confirms the round red/navy infinity 'D' emblem + navy 'DAIHO' wordmark, exact match to internal. Verified this is Daiho Industrial (plastics/automotive supplier), not the similarly-named Daiho Corporation (construction, daiho.co.jp). Valid vector (3739 bytes).
Wikimedia Commons 'DAIKIN logo.svg'. Rendered confirms the blue 'DAIKIN' wordmark with the cyan/black corner triangle, exact match to internal horizontal logo. Valid vector (3447 bytes).

Extracted the current header logo, an inline SVG (aria-label='Logo', 236x64) from danzer.com. Brand colors #F28E04 (orange) + #58585A (gray); rendered confirms the orange disc with vertical bars + gray 'DANZER' wordmark, exact match to internal. Rejected the Wikimedia 'Logo Danzer Group.svg' which is the outdated black serif 'DANZER GROUP' wordmark and does NOT match the current mark.

Internal ground truth is the OLD 'Draka Kabely' mark (blue ellipse/globe + 'Draka' serif wordmark, Czech subsidiary). Draka is now a Prysmian brand; the only clean source (Prysmian official Draka Brand Center, Draka_Positive_RGB_black.png, 1920x1080 transparent) is the 2024 rebrand: lowercase 'draka / A Prysmian Brand' in plain black, no globe. That is the correct entity but a completely different visual identity from the internal mark, so it would be an era/style mismatch. No clean vector/transparent source for the old blue-globe mark exists (not on Wikimedia Commons). Keeping the internal logo.

Internal ground truth is the OLD combined mark: uppercase 'PRYSMIAN' wordmark with magenta chevron, stacked with the old blue-globe 'Draka' logo. Available clean sources are the rebrands: Wikimedia 'Prysmian Logo.svg' is the new 2023 prysmian (lowercase gradient green/blue 'p' symbol), and the official Prysmian site serves logo_prysmian_2023; the official Draka asset is the 2024 'draka A Prysmian Brand'. None of these match the old combined PRYSMIAN+Draka mark visually. No clean source for the historical combined lockup exists. Keeping the internal logo. (Note: a stray Wikimedia 429 error HTML page briefly saved as draka-prismian.svg was deleted.)

Internal mark = dark-red diamond/rhombus with 'DTZ' wordmark. Correct entity is DTZ s.r.o., Liberec (Czech mechanical-engineering / technological-equipment supplier; dtzgroup.cz) · NOT the DTZ real-estate firm. Only logo on the official site is a 127x61px WHITE knockout PNG (transparent but invisible on white, far below the 600px minimum and wrong color vs the dark-red internal mark). Not on Wikimedia (small Czech firm). No clean correct asset available, so keeping the internal logo.

Dürr AG (German mechanical/plant engineering). Wikimedia 'Dürr AG logo.svg' · single-color blue (#00488e) boxed 'DÜRR' wordmark, exact match to internal ground truth. Chose this cleaner AG version over the multi-color 'Dürr Group' swoosh logo because it matches the internal boxed wordmark. Validated (<svg/</svg>, rendered correctly).

EGSTON (Austrian electronics / power systems, Eggenburg). Wikimedia 'Logo Egston.svg' · lime-green (#bbd63f) building/bar pictogram + black 'EGSTON' wordmark on transparent. Matches internal mark (internal had the lime background; this is the clean transparent version). Validated and rendered correctly.

ERA a.s., Pardubice (Czech air-traffic surveillance / avionics). Official site SVG · magenta/crimson (#B50938) lowercase 'era' wordmark with the small airplane symbol, exact match to internal ground truth. Disambiguated from other 'ERA' brands by the airplane mark. Validated and rendered correctly.

Erwin Junker Maschinenfabrik / JUNKER Group (German precision grinding machines). worldvectorlogo SVG of the blue (#08c) stylized 'EJ/J' symbol · exactly the mark inside the blue circle of the internal 'JUNKER partner for precision' logo. Confirmed it is the grinding-machine Junker, NOT the unrelated Junkers aircraft/heating brand. The downloaded file had a baked-in full-canvas white background rect (fill=#fff) which I removed to make it transparent; re-rendered clean. Caveat: this is the symbol only (no wordmark/tagline), but a clean correct vector upgrade over the internal raster.

Internal mark = striped-sphere symbol + 'EURO SOFTWARE' wordmark + 'A Member of the GK SOFTWARE Group'. EuroSoftware s.r.o. (Plzeň) is now fully absorbed into parent GK Software · eurosoftware.cz redirects to GK Software's careers portal, and the company page shows only the GK Software / GK-Fujitsu parent logo (a DIFFERENT mark). No clean source for the EuroSoftware-specific divisional logo (striped sphere) on Wikimedia/Brandfetch/seeklogo. Deliberately avoided substituting the GK Software parent logo (would be the wrong mark). Keeping the internal logo.

Explosia a.s., Semtín/Pardubice (Czech explosives manufacturer, maker of Semtex). Official site SVG (CorelDRAW export) · red (#E31E24) 'E' with star inside a circle + 'EXPLOSIA' wordmark, exact match to internal ground truth. Validated and rendered correctly.

Foxconn / Hon Hai. Wikimedia 'Foxconn logo.svg' · blue (#0165b0) 'FOXCONN' wordmark with registered-trademark mark, exact match to internal ground truth. Validated (<svg/</svg>) and rendered correctly.

Internal mark: 'FRESHREVOLUTION' wordmark in dark gray with a red puzzle-piece icon and tagline 'INSPECTION OF INDIRECT DISTRIBUTION'. This is a niche retail/merchandising field-inspection firm. No public clean vector or transparent-PNG logo could be found that I can confirm is this exact entity; web results returned unrelated 'Fresh'/'Revolution' food and branding companies. Kept internal logo to avoid wrong-entity substitution.

FTE automotive (German automotive supplier, clutch/brake actuation). Wikimedia Commons SVG rendered as exact match to internal: 'FTE' in dark warm-gray with red triangle wedge and lowercase 'automotive' below. Validated: valid <svg>, 13.8KB, correct colors/layout.

Internal mark: blue script 'Fuji' + bold blue 'Koyo' with a red orbit/atom graphic (Fuji Koyo steering columns, now JTEKT Column Systems). The specific combined 'Fuji Koyo' wordmark is not available on any clean source. Aggregators only offer 'Koyo' (Koyo Seiko/JTEKT bearings) and generic 'Fuji' logos, which are DIFFERENT entities. Official fujikoyo.cz domain is now parked. Avoided wrong-entity substitution; kept internal logo.

GCE Group (gas control equipment), red lowercase rounded 'gce' wordmark - entity confirmed and matches internal. However the official download page only provides CMYK JPEGs on white/solid backgrounds, and the site header logo is a 141px white-background PNG. No transparent PNG >=600px or SVG found from a confirmable source. Per rules, white-background rasters are not acceptable, so kept internal logo.

Gebauer & Griller (now GG Group, automotive cables/wiring, Austria). Official site SVG of the modern interlocking double-G mark in cyan/blue - exact match to internal ground-truth cyan 'GG' symbol. Preferred over the outdated black 'GG GEBAUER & GRILLER GMBH' version on worldvectorlogo. Validated: clean single-path <svg>, renders correctly. Small file (503 bytes) but complete and correct.

Gerresheimer AG (pharma glass/plastic packaging). Wikimedia Commons SVG is the current official 2021 logo: teal lowercase rounded 'gerresheimer' wordmark. Internal reference shows the older all-caps italic teal 'GERRESHEIMER' - same brand/color, just an older version; this SVG is the up-to-date official mark. Validated: valid <svg>, 11.6KB.

Internal mark: blue 'Glanzstoff' wordmark with a cyan dot inside the 'o' (Glanzstoff Industries, viscose tire-cord, Austria; now part of Indorama Ventures). Official glanzstoff.com domain is dead (blank nginx). No clean vector/transparent source found that I can confirm is this exact blue wordmark - aggregator hits were either historical 'Vereinigte Glanzstoff-Fabriken' or unrelated 'GLANZ' (glanz.vc). Avoided wrong-entity substitution; kept internal logo.

Glenmark Pharmaceuticals (India). SVG from companieslogo.com: red capsule/pill formed in the negative space of a stylised 'G' plus red lowercase 'glenmark' wordmark and 'A new way for life' tagline - matches internal ground-truth (red capsule-G symbol + lowercase glenmark wordmark; internal omits tagline). Validated: valid <svg>, 12.6KB, brand red #e51e26. Glenmark's logo is non-free on Wikimedia (India copyright), hence the aggregator source.

Internal ground-truth mark is 'gmc software' (GMC Software Technology, a document/output-management firm) with a green/blue stepped icon. That company rebranded to Quadient in 2017 and the old brand is defunct. Web searches for 'GMC logo svg' return the General Motors car brand (GMC) only - a completely different entity. To avoid a wrong-company logo, no swap made; keep the internal logo.

Grammer AG (seating/interior automotive supplier). Wikimedia Commons SVG, valid (<svg>...</svg>, 5480 bytes, path-based vector). Fill #005195 blue + white matches the internal GRAMMER blue wordmark mark exactly. Clean transparent vector.

Internal ground-truth is the OLD 'GRUPO ANTOLIN' logo (blue 3D swoosh + yellow accent + GRUPO ANTOLIN wordmark). The company has since rebranded to 'Antolin' - the current official site (antolin.com) uses a completely different lowercase 'antolin' wordmark with a blue/green circle (verified, 168x34 transparent PNG). No clean vector or transparent source of the OLD swoosh mark found on Wikimedia (category has only JPGs) or a reputable transparent source. Swapping in the new rebrand would be a visual mismatch with the internal mark, so kept internal.

GTW TECHNIK / GTW BEARINGS s.r.o. (Czech hydrodynamic bearings maker, gtw.cz). Internal mark = blue circular GTW symbol + wordmark. Official site logo is the correct mark but only a 274x64 transparent PNG (both color and white variants same size); no vector available. Under the 600px minimum, so not acceptable - keep internal.

HLS Czech s.r.o. = Czech branch of HLS Engineering Group (German automotive bodywork engineering, hls-group.com). Internal mark is 'HLS Czech s.r.o.' red/blue HLS in a blue box. Could not extract a logo asset URL from the parent site (no img/svg logo path in static HTML; likely CSS/JS-rendered), and parent 'HLS Engineering Group' mark may differ from the Czech-branch mark. No clean correct vector/transparent PNG found - keep internal.

Identified: 'H&D' = Hoenigsberg & Duevel Datentechnik (H&D International Group, automotive IT/engineering, now an HCL Technologies company). Internal ground-truth is the OLD blue laptop 'H&D' icon. The only available SVG (Wikimedia/de.wikipedia) is the CURRENT 'H&D - An HCL Technologies Company' wordmark, a substantially different design from the internal laptop mark. Swapping would be a brand/mark mismatch, so kept internal. (Download also rate-limited 429 at Wikimedia.)

Hyundai Mobis (Hyundai auto-parts arm). Wikimedia Commons SVG, valid (<svg>...</svg>, 6050 bytes, vector paths). Fills #1C4381 (blue HYUNDAI wordmark) + #CC1424 (red ring in MOBIS) match the internal mark exactly - this is the older HYUNDAI MOBIS logo shown in the internal reference, not the newer flat rebrand. Clean transparent vector.

iDEAL Automotive (German automotive interior textiles/acoustics supplier, ideal-automotive.com). Official-site logo PNG, 600x243, RGBA with transparency (alpha 0-255). Matches internal mark (red lowercase 'i', red box, IDEAL + AUTOMOTIVE). No vector available; transparent PNG at exactly the 600px minimum width is acceptable. (German .de domain had a TLS cert mismatch; .com site served the asset cleanly.)

Impact Industry Brno, a.s. (Rosice u Brna), engineering/sheet-metal firm · confirmed correct entity (impactbrno.cz). Internal mark = grey/red 'i' triangle symbol + 'Impact Industry'. Only logo on their site is /themes/web/logo.png at 220x80, RGB on white (no transparency) · fails both the >=600px and transparency requirements. No Wikimedia/vector source exists for this small Czech company. Keeping internal raster.

INTERKOV spol. s r.o. (Czech, Praha) · manufacturer of lever-arch binder mechanisms / volume metalwork. Logo pulled from official interkov.cz header. PNG 900x169, RGBA transparent (alpha 0-255). Matches internal ground-truth blue 'INTERKOV' italic wordmark. No SVG available on site; transparent PNG at 900px is a clean upgrade over the internal jpg.

Inteva Products LLC (automotive interiors/closures) · logo from official intevaproducts.com header. PNG 1200x247, RGBA transparent. Matches internal ground-truth: blue half-circle 'i' symbol + black 'INTEVA' italic + 'PRODUCTS'. No clean official SVG found; 1200px transparent PNG is a solid upgrade.

Internal reference reads 'ITW PRONOVIA, s.r.o. - Global Automotive Components Group' with the red ITW mark; ITW Pronovia is the Czech subsidiary of Illinois Tool Works (ITW) · the parent group brand is correct. Took the official ITW corporate wordmark SVG from itw.com (dark-gray #414141 version, the standard brand color; itw.com's red version was not offered as a clean asset). Valid SVG, has </svg>. Caveat: this is the corporate ITW mark, not the 'Pronovia' subsidiary lockup; color is dark-gray rather than the internal red, but it is the authoritative ITW group logo.

JABLOTRON (Czech alarm/security manufacturer). Downloaded the official SVG from Wikimedia/Wikipedia (Inkscape-authored vector, valid </svg>). Matches internal ground-truth black 'JABLOTRON' wordmark with the yellow pie segment in the 'O'. Clean vector upgrade.

Jansen Display s.r.o. (Czech POS/display manufacturer, Prestanov). The internal mark is the classic 'jansendisplay - see the difference!' wordmark with a blue bracket. The company has rebranded as 'Showdown Displays Europe'; current jansen-display.cz only serves a rebranded 'JD by SDE' header logo (364x96, fully opaque white background) · wrong/updated mark AND fails size+transparency. No clean transparent source for the original 'jansendisplay see the difference' logo found. Keeping internal raster to avoid using the wrong (rebranded) mark.

JTEKT Corporation (Japanese bearings/steering automotive supplier, Koyo/Toyoda). Official SVG from Wikimedia Commons (551x266, valid </svg>). Matches internal ground-truth: black serif 'JTEKT' with the red lens/ellipse mark in the middle. Clean vector upgrade.

KDK Automotive (Czech plant in Tachov; plastic interior components, parent KDK Automotive GmbH) · confirmed correct entity. Internal ground-truth = circular interlocked KDK monogram (blue/grey) + 'KDK Automotive' text. Official site (kdkautomotive.com, old TYPO3) serves only kdk_logo.gif at 288x54 on a white background (opaque, no alpha) · fails >=600px and transparency, and is a GIF not SVG/PNG. No Wikimedia/vector or transparent source found. Keeping internal raster.

Official kermi.com logo SVG (viewBox 0 0 92 34). Arc-over-'KERMI' wordmark matches the internal ground-truth mark exactly. Validated: contains <svg>/</svg>, 1216 bytes. Wikimedia Commons File:Logo_kermi.svg also exists but upload host was rate-limiting, so used official site.

Correct global brand confirmed (elephant + K-spiral + 'kiswire' wordmark, matches internal). But the only clean global transparent asset (kiswire-nhy.com) is just 381px wide - below the 600px minimum. The 3360px transparent PNG on kiswire.cz (Wix) is the local subsidiary lockup with an added 'KISWIRE CORD CZECH' tagline line, a different lockup than the clean internal mark, so rejected. Kept internal logo.

Official konplan.com 2024 logo SVG. Same wordmark 'konplan' + stylized parenthesis/wave mark as internal. CAVEAT: company did a brand color refresh - current official color is teal/green (#014D52) whereas the internal reference is blue. Mark and shape are identical; this is the correct current logo. Validated: <svg>/</svg>, 2582 bytes.

Official lactalis.com header logo SVG (Contentful CDN, viewBox 208x74). Rendered and confirmed it is the classic oval-swoosh 'LACTALIS' lockup (dark-blue wordmark + light-blue ellipse swoosh) that exactly matches the internal reference - NOT the 2023 redesign. Client is the Czech Mlekarna Klatovy, part of Groupe Lactalis; uses the group brand mark. Validated: <svg>/</svg>, 3263 bytes.

NOTE: leadec is client index 68, not assigned to look up in detail this pass given time spent on rate-limited sources. Wikimedia only has a PNG (File:Leadec_Logo.png), no SVG; official leadec-services.com logo is delivered inline and a clean transparent >=600px asset was not confirmed. Internal 'leadec Industrial Services' raster retained. Set status=none to avoid an unverified download.

Official leoni.com header logo SVG. Rendered: blue 'LEONI' wordmark, exact match to internal ground truth. Wikimedia File:Leoni_AG_Logo.svg exists too but upload host was rate-limiting; official site used. Validated: <svg>/</svg>, 667 bytes.

Company confirmed = LUKOV PLAST spol. s r.o. (Cesky Dub, Czech automotive plastics/sun-visors). The internal blue 'lukov' wordmark matches their brand. Their site delivers the logo via an icon-font/CSS sprite (class 'icon-lukov-logo'), no standalone downloadable SVG/PNG; only asset is a social-share og-image card, not a clean logo. No clean transparent asset >=600px found. Kept internal logo.

Official madeta.cz logo SVG (viewBox 0 0 328 129). Blue (#004388) 'MADETA' wordmark inside the blue banner/ribbon on transparent background, exact match to internal ground truth. No Wikimedia SVG exists for Madeta. Validated: <svg>/</svg>, 1937 bytes.

Magna International (auto parts). Wikimedia Commons official SVG. Rendered thumbnail confirms exact match to ground truth: black M-triangle mark with red dot + grey MAGNA wordmark. Clean transparent vector. Downloaded via upload.wikimedia.org (Special:FilePath was 429 rate-limited).

MAHLE (automotive filtration/engine components). Wikimedia Commons official 2020 SVG (1024px nominal). Blue blocky MAHLE wordmark matches ground truth. Note: this is the bare wordmark; Sintera's reference adds the 'Driven by performance' tagline, but the brand mark itself is the correct current MAHLE logo.

MANN+HUMMEL (filtration). Wikimedia Commons official SVG. Correct green MANN+HUMMEL wordmark. Caveat: this is the horizontal wordmark lockup; Sintera's reference uses the older green-square block lockup. Same brand, current official logo - acceptable clean upgrade.

Correct entity = M.A.S. Automation a.s. (Czech conveyor/Foerdertechnik firm); same bracketed 'M.A.S.' monogram mark as the ground truth (which uses the 'Foerdertechnik und Anlagenbau' tagline; the website uses 'AUTOMATION'). However only small raster logos exist (~245px PNG, header + footer), no SVG. Below the 600px transparent-PNG threshold, so keeping the internal logo. No clean upgrade available.

MBtech (Mercedes-Benz/AKKA engineering & consulting). Official site mbtech-group.com is a JS/bot-protected SPA with no fetchable asset. Accepted the vector from cdnlogo (identical file also on worldvectorlogo). Rendered thumbnail confirms correct serif 'MB' wordmark + arc/swoosh structure matching ground truth. CAVEAT: this vector is monochrome grey (single #615d5d fill) - it lacks the orange arc and grey 'tech' color split of Sintera's full-color reference. Correct brand, clean scalable transparent vector, but color is flattened.

Correct entity confirmed = MD ELEKTRONIK (automotive data-cable assembly, md-elektronik.com). Official header logo is a transparent PNG but only 261x109px - well below the 600px minimum. No larger or SVG variant exists (probed _2024/_lg/.svg/@2x paths, all redirect to homepage). Keeping internal logo.

MEA Group (building systems / water management / drainage, mea-group.com). Official-site SVG including the 'BUILDING SUCCESS' claim - rendered thumbnail is an exact match to the red/yellow ground-truth mark. WRONG-ENTITY TRAP AVOIDED: Wikimedia's 'Mea_Logo_rgb_mitZusatz.svg' is a different company ('mea - meine apotheke', a green/magenta German pharmacy co-op); that candidate was downloaded, visually rejected, and deleted.

Ground truth = standalone 'Megatech' mark (dark-red bars + navy-blue wordmark, automotive interior components). Megatech Industries was acquired by Sapa: megatech-industries.com now 301-redirects to sapacompany.com. Only available assets are (a) a DIFFERENT company on seeklogo/brandsoftheworld (black 'mega+ech'/'m+' tech wordmark, and an Argentinian informatics firm), and (b) a post-acquisition co-branded 'sapa-megatech-white' monochrome PNG on the Sapa site. Neither matches Sintera's standalone red/navy mark. No clean correct logo found - keeping internal.

Correct company confirmed (Membrain sales-enablement/CRM, membrain.com). Internal ground truth is the full lockup: orange swoosh icon + grey/orange 'MemBrain' wordmark. The only standalone clean SVG exposed on the official site is the icon-only 'Without Text' mark, and it is MONOCHROME dark grey (#1C1C1D) with NO wordmark and NO orange. That is a worse match than the internal full-color lockup, so keeping internal. No full-color full-lockup vector was findable at official/guessable paths.

Exact match to internal ground truth (the 'me opta' two-oval lockup). Downloaded the OFFICIAL Meopta logo PDF from meopta.com, rendered at high res, then made the page background transparent via edge flood-fill (preserving the white interior of the 'me' oval and the knocked-out white 'opta' text). Result is a clean transparent PNG 1284x408 (>=600px wide, alpha 0-255). No pdf2svg tool was available locally so a true SVG could not be produced; this transparent raster from the official vector PDF is the best clean asset.

Perfect match to internal ground truth: blue 'HYUNDAI' wordmark above black 'MOBIS' with the red swoosh/ring inside the O. Wikimedia Commons SVG, valid XML, brand colors #1C4381 (blue) and #CC1424 (red). Mobis Czech is the local plant of Hyundai Mobis (same brand mark).

The company REBRANDED to 'MVIA' (effective Jan 2025); moraviapropag.cz now redirects to MVIA and the only official logo.svg there is the new 'MVIA' wordmark (blue gradient M + black VIA). The internal ground truth is the OLD 'moravia propag' mark (blue M + grey 'moravia propag' wordmark), which is gone from the official site. The current MVIA logo is a different wordmark and would not match the internal mark, so keeping internal.

MSSL = Motherson (Samvardhana Motherson group / Motherson Sumi). Internal ground truth shows 'samvardhana motherson' (stacked) with the distinctive red ascending/staircase bars. This en.wikipedia SVG shows the current 'motherson' wordmark + the SAME red staircase bars in the SAME brand red (#DA2027). The group simplified its primary wordmark to 'motherson' in a recent rebrand; same entity, same iconic symbol and color. NOTE: I rejected the companieslogo.com 'MOTHERSON' SVG because it had only the wordmark and was MISSING the bars; also rejected the Wikimedia 'Samvardhana Motherson Peguform' file as that is a different sub-brand (SMP).

Extracted the official inline <symbol id='mubea-logo'> from mubea.com header into a standalone valid SVG. Brand blue #004B95 matches the internal blue 'Mubea' wordmark exactly. This official version additionally includes the 'light.efficient.global.' tagline beneath the wordmark; internal is wordmark-only, but the wordmark and color are identical. Wikimedia's Mubea_logo.svg was unreachable (persistent rate-limit), so used the official site directly.

Right company confirmed (MZ Liberec, mzliberec.cz, medical/industrial gas distribution systems). This is the CURRENT official logo: a modern black 'MZ' monogram + black 'Liberec'. However it differs notably from the internal ground truth, which is the OLDER blue circular 'mz' emblem (m/z in a dark-blue ring) + blue 'mz Liberec'. Same entity, newer brand version, different symbol and color · flagged unsure so the orchestrator can decide whether to keep the internal blue-emblem version. The file itself is a clean valid SVG.

Extracted the official inline logo SVG from notino.com header (clean vector, valid XML). This is the BOXED/reversed variant: white 'NOTINO' knocked out of a black rounded rectangle. Internal ground truth is the POSITIVE variant: black 'NOTINO' + 'TODAY IS YOURS' tagline on transparent. Same brand, same wordmark, but a different official layout variant (no tagline, inverted). Wikimedia's Notino_logo.png (800x333, positive form, matches internal more closely) was unreachable due to persistent upload.wikimedia.org rate-limiting on this IP across many retries, so used the official site's vector instead.

Internal ground truth = blue 'OLBRICH' wordmark with circular 'e' symbol (Olbrich GmbH machinery, Bocholt). Company was acquired and rebranded to Matthews Engineering; olbrich.com and olbrich.group now serve only Matthews branding, so the original OLBRICH wordmark is no longer available from the official source. The one aggregator hit (logovectordl) was a 900x500 PNG with NO transparency (solid white background, alpha extrema 255,255) -> fails transparency rule. worldvectorlogo/seeklogo have no Olbrich machinery logo, Wikimedia only has unrelated files. No clean transparent SVG/PNG better than internal raster found; keeping internal.

Display name says 'Omega Optics' but internal ground-truth mark reads 'OMEGA OPTIX' (Czech eyewear maker) with a crosshair/lens symbol. Pulled official SVG from omega-optix.cz header. Rendered: pink+blue stylized eye/lens circle above 'OMEGA OPTIX' wordmark with pink X -> same company, modernized version of the internal mark. Valid SVG (6287 bytes, has </svg>). Correct entity confirmed.

ZF Openmatics telematics brand. Wikimedia Commons transparent PNG, 1920x227, RGBA, alpha extrema (0,255) = transparent. Rendered: 'OPEN' in blue + 'MATICS' in gray, exactly matching the internal two-tone wordmark (internal is lowercase, this is uppercase, but identical brand/colors/scheme). No clean SVG found (seekvectorlogo/brandfetch links gated); this transparent PNG >=600px is the best clean asset. Correct entity confirmed.

Internal ground truth = old 'parfums.cz' wordmark with pink lotus/flower (Czech perfume e-shop). The brand parfums.cz was rebranded to NOTINO in Sept 2016 and the 'parfums.cz' brand is defunct. brandfetch.com/parfums.cz now serves Notino branding. The only available current asset is the Notino logo, which is a DIFFERENT wordmark -> wrong-entity risk avoided. No clean version of the original parfums.cz pink-flower logo available from any reputable transparent source. Keeping internal historical logo.

Client is PEKM Kabeltechnik s.r.o. (Liberec, cable harnesses), 100% owned by Commercial Vehicle Group, Inc. (CVG) since 2007. Internal ground-truth = CVG corporate logo (legacy gold/khaki 'CVG' in an oval globe + 'Commercial Vehicle Group, Inc.'). Obtained CVG's CURRENT corporate vector SVG (single #0e73ba blue fill, viewBox 1579x351). Full-width render confirms it reads 'CVG' clearly -> same entity, current branding. Valid SVG (1812 bytes, has </svg>), transparent. Note: it is the modern blue rebrand, not the older gold version, but same company.

Phillips-Medisize (medical device CDMO, Molex/Koch subsidiary). Internal ground truth = blue 'phillips Medisize' wordmark + orange 'Partnerships Built on Innovation' tagline. Official phillipsmedisize.com uses an inline/header SVG that could not be extracted as a downloadable asset; no logo .svg/.png exposed in page source. seeklogo has no result; brandfetch and tukuz are gated aggregators (couldn't validate transparency/correctness). No clean, confirmed transparent SVG/PNG obtainable; keeping internal raster rather than risk an aggregator/white-bg copy.

PMP PAL International s.r.o. (Czech automotive supplier, wiper/window systems; PAL historic brand, Piramal-owned). Internal ground truth = 'PAL' inside a circle with (R). Found the EXACT matching mark on the official pal-wiping-systems.com (dark navy PAL-in-circle with (R)), transparent PNG, but only 342x342 -> BELOW the 600px minimum. No SVG exists (tested logo.svg/PAL.svg paths = 404); header logo_pal_white.png is white and only 346x57. Brand confirmed correct but no asset meets the >=600px transparent requirement, so reporting none and keeping internal.

Pražská strojírna a.s. (Prague-Vinoř, tram track/switch manufacturer). Internal ground truth = red rod/cylinder crossing blue elements forming an X + 'PRAŽSKÁ STROJÍRNA a.s.' text. Official pstroj.cz current logo (ps-logo-2.png) is transparent and shows the matching red-rod + blue-X symbol, but only 140x183 -> BELOW 600px. Older logo_black.png is 70x92. No SVG available (tested logo.svg paths = 404), no Wikimedia logo. Brand confirmed but no asset meets the >=600px transparent requirement; keeping internal.

Official 'Prysmian Group' wordmark (black 'Prysmian' + grey 'Group'), valid vector SVG from logotyp.us. Exact match to internal reference. Wikimedia Commons had File:Prysmian_logo.svg but their upload servers were returning HTTP 429 (rate-limited) throughout this batch, so logotyp.us was used as an equivalent clean vector source.

redtoo (Swiss IT consultancy, 'we do IT with a smile') was acquired by VINCI Energies and rebranded to 'Axians Redtoo'; redtoo.com is now a parked GoDaddy domain. The original red 'redtoo' wordmark exists only as a 324px-wide transparent PNG (2014 WordPress logo.png, recovered via Wayback) and a 224px 2012 version - both below the 600px minimum. No SVG or sufficiently large transparent raster of the correct original brand exists. Kept internal logo rather than risk the Axians-rebranded mark.

R+S Automotive GmbH (German automotive interior tooling supplier). The standalone brand was absorbed into Olbrich/Matthews (rs-automotive.com now redirects to matthews-engineering.com), so the official RSA.svg logo was recovered from the Wayback Machine snapshot of the official site's /System/img/RSA.svg. Valid vector SVG; renders as white 'R+S' over 'AUTOMOTIVE' on the grey field - an exact match to the internal grey 'R+S AUTOMOTIVE' reference mark.

Correct entity is SANBORN a.s. (Czech, 'Energetické a ekologické technologie'), NOT the US Sanborn Mfg air-compressor maker. The SVG renders with the exact blue water-drop-in-circular-S emblem and blue 'SANBORN' wordmark matching the internal reference (worldvectorlogo version additionally includes 'a.s.' and the tagline). 2500x2500 valid vector.

Ground truth is the Czech sausage brand 'Schneider - s nami dokazete velke veci' (red ribbon/banner mark). Its old site schneider-group.cz is now a 'Welcome' placeholder and subpages 404; only a 173x97 px header logo.png survives in the Wayback Machine (far below 600px). The live 'Schneider Group' holding logo at schneidergroup.cz is a completely different visual mark (plain wordmark) and would be a wrong-entity match, so it was deliberately avoided. Kept internal red-ribbon logo.

Skalican (Czech meat/sausage processor, Ceska Skalice, skalican.cz). Original transparent PNG pulled from their official Wix media CDN: 2549x683, transparency confirmed (alpha 0-255). Renders as blue swoosh arc above red 'Skalican' wordmark with hacek - exact match to internal reference. No SVG available on the Wix site, but this transparent raster is well above the 600px requirement.

Internal reference is 'SKODA TVC s.r.o.' which uses the standard Skoda winged-arrow emblem + 'SKODA' wordmark. The official green winged-arrow Skoda emblem SVG (from logotyp.us, equivalent to Wikimedia's File:Skoda_Auto.svg which was unavailable due to Wikimedia 429 rate-limiting) matches the emblem in the reference exactly. Valid vector SVG. Caveat: this is the parent Skoda brand emblem; the 'TVC s.r.o.' sub-line text is not part of the asset, but the mark itself is correct.

SpofaDental a.s. (Czech dental materials maker, part of Kerr/Envista). The live spofadental.com is behind bot protection. Only small transparent header rasters were recoverable via Wayback (spofadental_logo.png 220x90 and spofa-logo.png 202x41) - both well below the 600px minimum. No SVG or large transparent version of the modern blue 'SpofaDental - A Kerr Company' wordmark was available from any clean source. Kept internal logo.

Official SSI Schaefer logo SVG from ssi-schaefer.com (Adobe Illustrator export, valid <svg>...</svg>, 8.6KB). Correct entity: same 'SSI SCHAEFER' wordmark as the internal ground-truth. Caveat: official asset is monochrome black, whereas internal is red 'SSI' + black 'SCHAEFER'; same brand/mark, different color treatment. Wikimedia SVG existed but upload.wikimedia.org blocked my IP, so used the official site asset instead.

Official Swoboda group logo SVG from swoboda.com (valid SVG, 12.9KB, viewBox 197x59). The 'swoboda' wordmark matches the internal exactly; internal additionally has 'stamping' (a division label). This is the parent/group mark · same brand, division suffix omitted. Clean blue vector.

Clean transparent vector SVG (valid, 4.5KB; bounding rect is fill-opacity=0 so genuinely transparent). Correct entity: same TD diamond symbol + 'Tech Data' wordmark with registered mark as the internal. Caveat: this is the INVERTED/negative lockup (white text+symbol on a blue #34549c box), whereas the internal is positive blue-on-light with the 'The Difference in Distribution' tagline. Wikimedia 'Logo TechData.svg' was the same blue-box variant and was IP-blocked from curl. A 2400x2400 transparent PNG of the identical variant is also available from freebiesupply if a raster is preferred.

Official Technistone logo SVG from technistone.com (Adobe Illustrator export, valid, 6.1KB; dark #1D1D1B + grey #54565A). Rendered and visually confirmed: 'TechniStone(R)' wordmark identical to internal. Current official version adds a small 'A WILSONART COMPANY' tagline (Technistone was acquired by Wilsonart in 2019); core wordmark unchanged. Used the positive logo.svg, not the white logo-negative.svg.

Official SVG from tgs.cz (TGS nastroje-stroje-technologicke sluzby, Czech engineering tooling/machinery firm in Myto/Holoubkov). Valid SVG (2.6KB) with blue #0676cf + black #2B2A29, matching the internal blue-stripes + black 'TGS' mark. Correct Czech entity, not any same-name foreign company.

TDK full logo SVG (blue #0A57A0 geometric triangle/diamond symbol + 'TDK' wordmark), rendered and visually confirmed. Correct entity: internal mark is the TDK symbol + 'TDK / TDK-EPC' · EPCOS AG became TDK Electronics (formerly TDK-EPC), so the current TDK corporate logo is the right brand. Wikimedia TDK SVGs existed but upload.wikimedia.org was IP-blocked; used companieslogo full-size vector. The internal 'TDK-EPC' sub-text is legacy and not in the current corporate mark.

TRCZ s.r.o. = Tokai Rika Czech (Lovosice; automotive safety parts/seatbelts/switches), confirmed via official trcz.cz. Internal mark is a distinct stylized red/blue 'TRCZ' wordmark, NOT the Toyoda Gosei brand (a common confusion I avoided). Only logo asset found is trcz.cz/wp-content/uploads/2024/05/TRCZ-logo.jpg at 522x219, RGB JPG with NO transparency (white background); their site otherwise exposes only favicons. No clean transparent PNG or vector exists from any reputable source. Keeping internal logo.

Tristone Flowtech Group (automotive fluid/cooling systems, Frankfurt), correct entity per internal mountain-triangles + 'TRISTONE' mark. Official tristone.com header logo (tristone_logo_head.png) is transparent but only 210x130 (too small). Their /resources/logo.png is 757x757 but solid RGB with no alpha (fails transparency). Seeklogo only had 'Tristone Capital' (a different, wrong company). No clean vector or >=600px transparent PNG of the correct Tristone Flowtech logo found. Keeping internal logo.

Classic red italic TRW automotive wordmark. Wikimedia 'File:TRW logo.svg' (1105x320). SVG fill #cc0001 red matches the internal ground-truth red italic TRW mark exactly. Chose the standalone TRW mark (not the ZF TRW combined logo) to match the internal reference. Valid XML, single svg.

VOITH blue wordmark with dot-in-O. Wikimedia 'File:Voith logo.svg' (1024px wide; preferred over the tiny 113px 'Voith Logo.svg' variant). Fill #2d4275 dark blue matches the internal ground-truth blue VOITH wordmark. Valid XML.

VOLKE Mladá Boleslav spol. s r.o. (niche CZ automotive supplier, volke.cz). Internal mark = green VOLKE wordmark + silver V-in-oval. Official site is a JS-rendered SPA exposing only its CLIENTS' logos (skoda, vw, magna, etc.) as static assets, not its own. No Wikimedia/worldvectorlogo/seeklogo entry exists for this company. No clean correct source better than the internal raster - keeping internal.
Lowercase italic 'wanzl' blue wordmark. Wikimedia 'File:Wanzl-logo.svg' (566px). Fill #008DCD blue matches the internal ground-truth blue wanzl wordmark. Valid XML, Illustrator-generated.

Internal ground truth is ZODIAC AEROSPACE (navy wordmark + blue gradient swirl-square mark), the aerospace company now part of Safran - NOT the pool/inflatables brand. SVG from logo.wine contains navy #00386d, light-blue #a1daf8, mid-blue #0075a0 across 10 linearGradient + 2 radialGradient elements forming the metallic blue swirl mark, plus the grey/navy ZODIAC AEROSPACE wordmark. Matches the internal mark. Wikimedia had no Zodiac Aerospace file. Valid XML (1200x800 viewport).

Sécheron Hasler Group (Swiss rail, secheron.com). Internal ground truth = green/black leaf mark + black 'Sécheron' wordmark. Official site renders its header logo from an SVG sprite where the logo + logo-text symbols are WHITE-only (#fff / #EFFFF8) designed to overlay the green header background - unusable on a transparent canvas and wrong colors vs ground truth. No Wikimedia entry; brandfetch returned 403; worldvectorlogo/seeklogo had no Sécheron file. No clean transparent colored source found better than the internal raster - keeping internal.

LINET (CZ hospital beds, linet.com). SVG from worldvectorlogo: red #cc1d50 + grey #929496 - matches the internal ground-truth red/grey diamond mark + red LINET wordmark exactly. Official linet.com logos page exposed no public SVG/transparent download. Valid XML (192x192 viewBox, scales to 2500px). Reputable vector source, correct entity.

SITEL spol. s r.o. (CZ telecom/cabling system integrator, sitel.cz) - confirmed the correct entity (blue cloud/oval + yellow star + white SiTEL text), NOT the call-center brand. The only logo asset on the official site is a transparent PNG at 139x98 px - well below the 600px minimum, so not acceptable. No SVG on site; no Wikimedia/worldvectorlogo entry for this Czech company. Keeping internal raster (which is higher-res than anything findable).

Výzkumný ústav železniční, a.s. (VUZ), cdvuz.cz · Czech railway research institute. Ground-truth internal mark is the italic-bold 'VUZ' wordmark inside a stadium/pill double-border outline; I confirmed the brand by matching the official site's header logo (vuz-logo.webp), which is pixel-for-pixel the same mark. No SVG exists anywhere (site theme assets, footer, or Wikimedia Commons). The only official transparent assets are the header WebP (500x298) and footer PNG (500x298), both white-on-transparent and identical to the internal asset · both below the 600px minimum width and not better than the internal raster. Honest outcome: keep the internal logo.
